This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2023-02-09, 2023-02-18, 2023-02-12, 2023-02-02. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for artist prefixed tags
artist:wikidata and artist:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because artist:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q6833370 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Michael Parekowhai to en:Michael Parekōwhai
The World Turns - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(3013751688)['artist:wikidata'='Q6833370']['artist:wikipedia'='en:Michael Parekowhai']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for artist prefixed tags']
